cards.jyutping: maa1 mi4 aa1 ngo5 dei6 ji5 ging1 zap1 jyun4 haan4 fong4 laa3

defs: 1. to zoom; 2. to enlarge; to banish

can, can do, able to do; work; helpful; ready
(before an adjective or verb) to the highest degree; (the) most ...; -est

(n.) a boy or a young man.
